title: 2024-25 British Business Survey Results
body: "This latest edition of the British Business Survey was conducted by the British Office Taipei between October 2024 and January 2025, in collaboration with the British Chamber of Commerce in Taipei. The aim was to generate up-to-date information on current sentiment among British firms active in Taiwan about the outlook for business in both an international and Taiwanese context, to determine their concerns, and highlight what they consider the most pressing issues that should be addressed in UK government policy and in bilateral exchanges between Westminster and Taipei. "
